zh.lifeSummary: 當Prince Jaromar I of Rügen於大約1140年出生在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫盧根時，他的父親Ratislaus "the Wise" King of the Rügen37歲，母親NN Gützkow16歲。他和Princess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmark至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1217年在他的家鄉享年78歲，埋葬在德國海因里希_包莫盧根伯根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Prince Jaromar I of Rügen于大约1140年出生在德国梅可倫波-沃爾包莫盧根时，他的父亲Ratislaus "the Wise" King of the Rügen37岁，母亲NN Gützkow16岁。他和Princess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmark至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1217年在他的家乡享年78岁，埋葬在德国海因里希_包莫盧根伯根。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Rügen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Gerhardt.

variants.name: Ruge
meanings: nickname from Middle High German ruowe, rūge ‘quiet, calm’ or in the north from Low German rūg ‘rough, crude’.
from the personal name Rugo, a shortened form of Rüdiger (see Rudiger ).

en.lifeSummary: When Prince Jaromar I of Rügen was born about 1140, in Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany, his father, Ratislaus "the Wise" King of the Rügen, was 37 and his mother, NN Gützkow, was 16. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Princess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmark. He died in 1217, in his hometown, at the age of 78, and was buried in Bergen, Rügen, Pomerania, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Prince Jaromar I of Rügen est né environ 1140, à Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne, son père, Ratislaus "the Wise" King of the Rügen, avait 37 ans et sa mère, NN Gützkow, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Princess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmark. Il est décédé en 1217, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Bergen, Rügen, Pommern, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.Putbus,Rygen,Pommern,Prussia: Putbus, Rügen, Pommern, Freistaat Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Prince Jaromar I of Rügen um 1140 in Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ratislaus "the Wise" King of the Rügen 37 und seine Mutter NN Gützkow 16. Er hatte mit Princess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmark mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1217 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bergen, Rügen, Pommern, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Jaromar I of Rügen è nato il circa 1140 nel Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania, il suo padre, Ratislaus "the Wise" King of the Rügen, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, NN Gützkow, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Princess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmark. Morì nel 1217, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Bergen, Rügen, Pommern, Preußen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Prince Jaromar I of Rügenが約1140年にドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンルuジェンで生まれた時，父Ratislaus "the Wise" King of the Rügenは37歳，母NN Gützkowは16歳であった。彼はPrincess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmarkとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1217年に故郷で78歳で死去し，ドイツプレウssンポンメルンルuジェンバージェンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Prince Jaromar I of Rügen(이)가 대략 1140년 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 u겐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ratislaus "the Wise" King of the Rügen(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 NN Gützkow(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Princess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmark(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1217년 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레우ss 폼머 u겐 버겐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Jaromar I of Rügen nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha, seu pai, Ratislaus "the Wise" King of the Rügen, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, NN Gützkow, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Princess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmark. Ele faleceu em 1217, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Bergen, Rügen, Pommern, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Prince Jaromar I of Rügen родился около 1140 г. в местности рuджен, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Ratislaus "the Wise" King of the Rügen было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали NN Gützkow, 16. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Princess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmark. Он умер в 1217 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности биржен, рuджен, поммирн, Пруссия, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Prince Jaromar I of Rügen nació aproximadamente 1140, en Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania, su papá, Ratislaus "the Wise" King of the Rügen, tenía 37 años y su mamá, NN Gützkow, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Princess Hildegard Knudsdatter af Danmark. Murió en 1217, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Bergen, Rügen, Pommern, Preußen, Alemania.
